research_goal: Smoke test the local browser-use walkthrough pipeline on one public, non-destructive flow.

products.name: Wikipedia Smoke
products.notes: Use this only to verify local browser control, LLM wiring, evidence capture, report writing, and evaluation.

scenarios.title: Inspect public entry and search flow
scenarios.persona: Product manager validating the walkthrough system
scenarios.goal: Confirm that the agent can open a real public page, identify the primary task, and complete a safe search flow.
steps: Identify the primary user task and main interactive controls
Open a relevant result if it is clearly safe and public
Summarize whether the flow was understandable
success_criteria: A safe public search can be completed
The agent returns a concise final summary
